stepTitle: Now, we will return to the problem posed at the beginning of the \section. A bicycle ramp is constructed for high-level competition with an angle of $$\theta$$ formed by the ramp and the ground. Another ramp is to be constructed half as steep for novice competition. If $$\tan\theta=\frac{5}{3}$$ for higher-level competition, what is the measurement of the angle for novice competition?
